messagingConfiguration.label: Messaging configuration
messagingConfiguration.description: The configuration link in the Privacy Requests sidebar where a user can configure a messaging provider and storage.

assetConsentStatusLabels.label: Asset consent status labels
assetConsentStatusLabels.description: Consent status labels for assets discovered by the web monitor

downloadAccessRequestResults.label: Download access request results
downloadAccessRequestResults.description: Download access data from completed requests

newIntegrationManagement.label: New integration management
newIntegrationManagement.description: Shows all integrations (including SaaS) in the integrations page

alphaPrivacyNoticesSandbox.label: Alpha privacy notices sandbox
alphaPrivacyNoticesSandbox.description: Enable privacy notices sandbox page for testing consent v3

alphaWebMonitorLlmClassification.label: Web monitor LLM classification
alphaWebMonitorLlmClassification.description: Use LLM to classify website assets that cannot be identified by Compass

alphaDarkMode.label: Alpha light and dark theme
alphaDarkMode.description: Enable switching themes on Home page

alphaRbac.label: Alpha RBAC
alphaRbac.description: Dynamic role-based access control system for roles, permissions, and user assignments

alphaDashboard.label: Alpha new dashboard
alphaDashboard.description: Enable the new Ant Design-only home dashboard

alphaJiraIntegration.label: Alpha Jira integration
alphaJiraIntegration.description: Enable Jira DSR integration for creating and managing Jira issues from privacy requests

entraMonitor.label: Entra monitor
entraMonitor.description: Enable Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) identity provider monitoring

heliosInsights.label: Helios insights
heliosInsights.description: Enable the new monitor progress widgets for the action center in Helios
